chapter: Cause: mural thrombus dispersed by delivery system

context: √  no dilatation of ascending aorta √  asymmetrically thicker ventricular septum than free wall of LV (95%) √  normal / small left + right ventricular cavities (95%) √  lucent subaortic filling defect in systole √  focal convexity of left upper-mid cardiac margin = anterior aspect of ventricular septum (rare) ECHO: √  coarse systolic flutter of valve cusps √  opening of leaflets followed by rapid inward move in mid systole, leaflets may remain in partially closed position through latter portion of systole (to appose borders of the flow jet) √  systolic anterior motion of mitral valve Cx:     m
